description: You are a computational biologist preparing training data for a computer vision model. Extract a specific cellular event from the microscopy time-lapse video at /home/ga/Videos/lab_data/microscopy_timelapse.mp4 based on the temporal window, spatial bounding box, and contrast enhancement requirements specified in /home/ga/Documents/extraction_protocol.txt. Save the 150 extracted frames as PNG images to /home/ga/Pictures/dataset_44B/ using a 3-digit sequential naming scheme. Document the parameters used in a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Pictures/dataset_44B/manifest.json containing the keys: 'start_time', 'duration', 'crop_x', 'crop_y', 'crop_width', 'crop_height', and 'contrast_factor'.
